positive: Minimalist cosmic forest scene, ultra-detailed vector art style, featuring bioluminescent alien flora and fauna. The main subject is a cluster of stylized, glowing tree trunks forming an archway, suggesting a portal or gateway. The ground is covered in intricate, geometric patterns reminiscent of circuit boards, glowing with soft sapphire and emerald light. The composition is symmetrical and centered, utilizing negative space effectively. Lighting is dramatic and ethereal, emanating primarily from the flora itself (self-illuminating sources). Color palette is restricted to deep indigo, cyan, neon green, and hints of gold. Perfect for apparel repeat pattern or central chest print. Clean silhouettes, crisp lines, high contrast.
negative: blurry, noise, watermark, text, lowres, artifacts, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, grainy, monochrome, sketch, painting, photorealistic, logo, signature
